about.summary: 현재 컴퓨터공학과에서 재학중인 학부생입니다. AI, 로봇 쪽에 관심이 있어요

details: Activities: GDG KNU AI Session Co-leader, AlLerGy Club President, ICPC 2025 Finalist

projects.title: Upstage Agentic Workflow Hackathon
projects.description: Designed and implemented an LLM-powered agentic automation workflow using n8n and the Upstage API. The system autonomously orchestrated multi-step tasks through structured agent pipelines.

projects.title: AI BOOTCAMP AWARDS Hackathon
projects.description: Planned and developed an AI-powered Android application leveraging public data APIs. The app provides intelligent data-driven recommendations to end users.

projects.title: SDU COSS Secure Coding Competition
projects.description: Designed and built an AI-based dementia diagnosis service following secure coding principles. Applied security best practices throughout the full development lifecycle.

projects.title: APOC Hackathon
projects.description: Participated in the 1st APOC Hackathon, planning and developing a project utilizing AR/XR technology. Explored spatial computing use cases within a short-form competitive setting.

experience.title: Undergraduate Researcher
bullets: Conducting research in quantum computing as an undergraduate lab member.
Attending regular lab seminars and contributing to paper reviews.

experience.title: AI Session Co-leader
experience.org: KNU Google Developer Groups (GDG) · Chuncheon, Korea
bullets: Co-leading the AI session of GDG KNU, organizing study sessions and tech talks.
Planning and presenting sessions on the latest AI trends including LLMs and agentic workflows.

experience.title: Club President
experience.org: AlLerGy — Algorithm Study Club · Kangwon National University
bullets: Founded and lead AlLerGy, a competitive programming and algorithm study club.
Organize weekly problem-solving sessions and guide members through algorithmic concepts.

experience.title: Peer Tutor — International Student Support
bullets: Served as a peer tutor for international students through the university tutoring program.
Provided academic support in major coursework and helped with campus life adjustment.

awards.title: Grand Prize (최우수상) — Upstage Agentic Workflow Hackathon
awards.description: Awarded for an LLM-powered agentic automation workflow built with n8n and the Upstage API. (2025.11.07 ~ 11.14)

awards.title: Grand Prize (최우수상) — AI BOOTCAMP AWARDS Hackathon
awards.description: Awarded for an AI-based Android application utilizing public data APIs. (2026.01.19 ~ 01.20)

awards.title: Excellence Award (우수상, 한국정보보호학회장상) — SDU COSS Secure Coding
awards.org: Korea Institute of Information Security & Cryptology (KIISC)
awards.description: Awarded for an AI-powered dementia diagnosis service developed under secure coding guidelines. (2025.10.17 ~ 11.28)

awards.title: Encouragement Award (장려상, 강원권 공동 교육혁신센터장상) — AI Learning Contest
awards.org: Gangwon Regional Joint Educational Innovation Center
awards.description: Awarded for a submission on AI learning methods and university life strategies. (2025.12.12 ~ 2026.01.26)

awards.title: ICPC Korea Regional Finalist
awards.description: Qualified for and competed in the ICPC Korea Regional (본선) in 2025.
